name: Megu Kataoka
description: She is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. She is assigned to Class 3-E, where she trains to become a professional assassin, with her teacher as the target. She is one of the two class representatives of Class 3-E, with the other being Yūma Isogai.  (Source: Ansatsu Kyoushitsu Wikia)
